# Pharmacy POS - Project Overview

This project is a static website for a Pharmacy Point of Sale (POS) system. It features various marketing pages, a dashboard, and a blog. The site uses Tailwind CSS for styling and includes a simple Node.js script to build the blog and CSS.

## Main Pages

- `index.html`: The landing page of the POS system.
- `pages/features.html`: Detailed features of the Pharmacy POS.
- `pages/pricing.html`: Pricing plans for the system.
- `pages/aboutUs.html`: Information about the company.
- `pages/contact.html`: Contact information and form.
- `pages/demo.html`: A page to request or view a demo.
- `pages/casestudy.html`: Case studies of clients using the system.
- `pages/inventory.html`: Information related to inventory management.
- `pages/sales.html`: Information related to sales management.
- `pages/dashboard.html`: A preview or layout of the system's dashboard.

## Legal Pages

- `pages/privacy.html`: Privacy Policy.
- `pages/tmc.html`: Terms and Conditions.
- `pages/refundPolicy.html`: Refund Policy.

## Blog

- `pages/blog.html`: The main blog index.
- `pages/blog/hello-world.html`: A sample blog post.

## Technical Stack

- **HTML5**: For page structure.
- **Tailwind CSS**: For styling (built using `npm run build:css`).
- **JavaScript / Node.js**: Used for build scripts (`npm run build:blog` using marked and gray-matter).

## Build Commands

- `npm run build`: Builds both CSS and Blog.
- `npm run serve`: Serves the project locally.
